texto: Writers use narratives to select from everything there is, and make contexts by putting the pieces into relation; that’s what writers do, they make contexts.
explicacao: Citação de Paul Shepheard sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Writers use narratives to select from everything there is, and make contexts by putting the piece…” articula reflexao, context, narrative em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como narrative e writers.

frase_original: Writers use narratives to select from everything there is, and make contexts by putting the pieces into relation; that’s what writers do, they make contexts.

texto: Everything is emotional because hope is… When I talk to people I no longer see rational beings engaged in rational discourse, I see objects, emoting. It has made me such a deep materialist that I see everything as objects, people, dogs, trees, rocks- objects that burn with the animation of hope, each engaged in their own private miracle of being. And the things that people make, the buildings and machines, the paintings and the poems, are artificial miracles, which glow from the light borrowed from their makers.
explicacao: Citação de Paul Shepheard sobre temas ligados a familia. “Everything is emotional because hope is… When I talk to people I no longer see rational beings en…” articula familia, emoting, emotional em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como emotional e humanity.

It has made me such a deep materialist that I see everything as objects, people, dogs, trees, rocks- objects that burn with the animation of hope, each engaged in their own private miracle of being. And the things that people make, the buildings and machines, the paintings and the poems, are artificial miracles, which glow from the light borrowed from their makers.
